Investment Thesis

Pick how you think. Map updates live.

1. Strategy

Infrastructure-Ready
Pipes there. Quick deployment.
Growth Corridor
People moving in. Long hold.
Contrarian
Bet ahead of the curve.
Balanced
Equal weight all factors.

2. Risk tolerance

Data Sources

POIs: OpenStreetMap, refreshed weekly.
SEC filings: EDGAR, scanned for retailer expansion mentions.
News: RSS feeds from Nashville Business Journal, Nashville Post, Tennessean.
Parcels & zoning: Real Metro Nashville categories. Per-parcel assignments illustrative.
